name: Css

aliases.name: Declaration
aliases.comment: A member of Rule. It has a property and it's value.

aliases.name: Node
aliases.comment: A top level member of Css stylesheet.

aliases.name: Property
aliases.comment: A member of Declaration. Css Property.

aliases.name: Rule
aliases.comment: A member of Css stylesheet. It has a selector and declarations (body).

aliases.name: Selector
aliases.comment: A member of Rule. Css Selector.

aliases.name: Value
aliases.comment: A member of Declaration. Css Value.

values.name: declaration
values.comment: Constructs a Declaration from a Property and a Value.

values.name: rule
values.comment: Constructs a Rule from a Selector and a List of Declaration.

values.name: style
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

values.name: stylesheet
values.comment: Constructs a Html Style Element from a List of Node.

binops.comment: For Property :- Value. Alias of declaration.
